title: Labels for Music Created With A.I. Could Join Explicit Lyrics Warnings
description: Major music industry groups, including the organization behind the Grammy Awards, have proposed labels for tracks made with some degree of artificial intelligence.
content:
More than 30 years ago, the music industry adopted a labeling system on albums to alert consumers — and their parents — about explicit lyrics. Something similar could soon be coming for songs that were created with the use of A.I.
A consortium of ind... [1692 chars]

title: Ravee Optics raises $6 million to meet growing AI demand for faster data transfers in space
description: Artificial intelligence is creating a new challenge beyond chips and data centers. As AI systems generate larger volumes of data and satellite networks continue to grow, moving information through space is becoming a major infrastructure problem. Dayton, Ohio-based startup Ravee Optics believes lasers, not traditional radio systems, will carry much of that traffic. Investors appear

title: Trump Is Snapping Up Stakes in Private Companies. Could A.I. Be Next?
description: Some tech executives are nervous that recent scrutiny of artificial intelligence models could be a prelude to a demand by the Trump administration for an ownership stake.
content: Over the past year, the Trump administration has made deals to acquire equity stakes in more than two dozen firms, an unusual practice that has extended the government’s influence over industries including semiconductors, nuclear energy, minerals, qu... [2038 chars]

title: AI gives hackers ‘machine speed’ attack capability, faster than banks can respond: Report
description: Artificial intelligence is allowing cybercriminals to launch sophisticated attacks at machine speed, making it harder for banks and financial institutions to keep pace, according to the Digital Threat Report 2025-26.
content: The report identifies “AI asymmetry” as one of the biggest cyber risks facing the banking, financial services, insurance (BFSI) and digital payments ecosystem. It says activities that once required specialist teams, significant resources and weeks of... [4620 chars]

title: 3-day AI training for officials in public sector organisations begins in Delhi
description: New Delhi, Jul 13 (PTI) A three-day programme aimed at imparting training to senior leadership and operational teams in the practical application of artificial intelligence in public sector organisations began here on Monday. India Tourism Development Corporation (ITDC), in collaboration with the Standing Conference of Public Enterprises (SCOPE) and the Lal Bahadur Shastri National Academy […]
content:
The programme combines leadership training with hands-on workshops on AI-driven organisational transformation, data-based decision-making and the responsible adoption of generative AI in public sector organisations, the ministry said in a statement.

title: Meta Has Been Looking to Expand Its AI Capabilities. It Has Now Announced Plans on Invest $50 Billion on a New Data Center.
description: Meta is dramatically expanding its largest artificial intelligence infrastructure project, increasing the planned investment in its Hyperion data center in rural Louisiana to more than $50 billion.
content: Meta is dramatically expanding its largest artificial intelligence infrastructure project, increasing the planned investment in its Hyperion data center in rural Louisiana to more than $50 billion as the company races to build the computing power nee... [3243 chars]

title: Economists warn of artificial intelligence impact on global economy
description: Hundreds of top economists and researchers urge global institutions to address potential large-scale job displacement caused by artificial intelligence.
content:
SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Hundreds of economists say in an open letter that institutions “must act now” to address how artificial intelligence could transform the economy and could put many people out of work.
